title: Prehistoric world
description: Prehistoric world adds  Prehistoric  fauna and flora from the Cambrian to present day into your worlds
body:
Prehistoric World Mod intends to recreate Prehistoric flora and fauna from the Cambrian to present day in your blocky world. Travel to worlds long forgotten to time. uncover what lies in the fossil record all of those eons ago. bring back the ancient animlas and plants to present day and do you dare to create a park with these flora and fauna? 

the Cambrian dimension is still wip but to activate the portal you need cambrian portal igniter 

note this mod is in beta stages  
 

discord server link 

https://discord.gg/GF6KtgHw
